description: Workspace-level lifecycle orchestrator for selected agentic-workspace modules.

commands.name: modules
commands.help: List workspace modules available to the orchestrator.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to report installed modules.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit full module registry and component detail. Prefer the default output for ordinary routing.

commands.classification_note: front door for declared module availability and install state

commands.name: summary
commands.help: Show the active execution summary from the planning module.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path to read summary from.

options.name: select
options.help: Return only comma-separated top-level or dotted JSON fields from the full command payload. Prefer this over --verbose when one or a few fields are needed.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit full planning summary detail. Prefer selectors/default routing for ordinary startup.

options.name: task
options.help: Optional task text used to return a task-scoped compact summary.

options.name: changed
options.help: Optional changed paths used to scope compact summary output.

commands.classification_note: compact active planning and handoff state

commands.name: planning
commands.help: Show planning workflow help or run Planning operations through the workspace front door.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used in example commands.

subcommands.name: new-plan
subcommands.help: Create a schema-valid execplan scaffold and optionally register it.

options.name: id
options.help: Stable slug/id for the plan; used as the .plan.json filename.

options.name: title
options.help: Human-readable plan title.

options.name: source
options.help: Optional source reference such as an issue URL or chat-intake summary.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: activate
options.help: Register the new plan in todo.active_items.

options.name: queue
options.help: Register the new plan in todo.queued_items.

options.name: switch_active
options.help: When used with --activate, demote existing active items into the queue before registering the new active plan.

options.name: prep_only
options.help: Mark this scaffold as a planning-only handoff slice.

options.name: overwrite
options.help: Replace an existing scaffold with the same id.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.name: promote-to-plan
subcommands.help: Promote a planning item into an execplan scaffold.

options.name: item_id
options.help: Planning item id to promote.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: plan_slug
options.help: Optional generated plan slug override.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.name: intake-artifact
subcommands.help: Route a freehand planning artifact into a canonical Planning surface.

options.name: artifact
options.help: Freehand planning artifact path inside the target repository.

options.name: route
options.help: Canonical Planning surface to route the artifact into.

options.name: id
options.help: Optional target id or slug for the canonical Planning surface.

options.name: title
options.help: Optional title when routing to an execplan scaffold.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: activate
options.help: Register an execplan route in todo.active_items.

options.name: queue
options.help: Register an execplan route in todo.queued_items.

options.name: switch_active
options.help: When used with --activate, demote existing active items before registering the new active plan.

options.name: remove_source
options.help: Remove the original artifact after successful canonical intake.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.classification_note: Planning freehand artifact intake front door

subcommands.name: archive-plan
subcommands.help: Close a completed execplan or parent lane after distillation.

options.name: plan
options.help: Plan path, slug, or id to archive.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

options.name: apply_cleanup
options.help: Apply narrow cleanup tied to the archived plan.

options.name: prepare_closeout
options.help: Write package-normalized closeout fields before archive validation runs.

options.name: retain_archive
options.help: Keep a completed execplan record under execplans/archive.

options.name: parent_lane_closeout
options.help: Close a parent lane from structured planning state.

options.name: closure_decision
options.help: Closeout decision to write when --prepare-closeout is used.

options.name: intent_satisfied
options.help: Whether the larger original intent is fully satisfied.

options.name: unsolved_intent
options.help: Continuation owner for unsolved larger intent.

options.name: intent_evidence
options.help: Evidence of intent satisfaction for prepared closeout.

options.name: closure_reason
options.help: Why the prepared closure decision is honest.

options.name: closure_evidence
options.help: Evidence carried forward by the prepared closure.

options.name: reopen_trigger
options.help: Reopen trigger for the prepared closure.

options.name: discard_summary
options.help: Closeout distillation discard bucket summary.

options.name: continuation_summary
options.help: Closeout distillation continuation bucket summary.

subcommands.name: closeout
subcommands.help: Close out a completed execplan through one command-owned writer.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: claim_level
options.help: Scope claimed by this closeout.

options.name: intent_status
options.help: Intent result for the closeout claim.

options.name: residue
options.help: Durable residue route for follow-up or learning.

options.name: proof_from
options.help: Use existing proof with 'last' or record the supplied proof command/text.

options.name: residue_owner
options.help: Canonical owner for non-empty residue or deferred intent.

options.name: what_happened
options.help: Finished-run summary to write when the execplan still has placeholder execution evidence.

options.name: scope_touched
options.help: Concrete scope touched by the finished run.

options.name: changed_surfaces
options.help: Concrete files or surfaces changed by the finished run.

options.name: review_summary
options.help: Closeout review summary for scope and intent reconciliation.

options.name: outcome_summary
options.help: Outcome delivered summary for the finished run.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show closeout actions without mutating files.

options.name: discard_archive
options.help: Do not retain the archived execplan record after cleanup.

options.name: format
options.help: Output format.

subcommands.name: close-item
subcommands.help: Close completed planning residue by id without hand-editing checked-in state.

options.name: item
options.help: Planning item id to close.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: reason
options.help: Optional closure reason to record in the action detail.

options.name: issue
options.help: Optional upstream issue reference tied to the closeout.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.name: create-review
subcommands.help: Create a schema-valid planning review record skeleton.

options.name: slug
options.help: Stable review record slug.

options.name: title
options.help: Human-readable review title.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: scope
options.help: Review scope summary.

options.name: classification
options.help: Review classification.

options.name: render_markdown
options.help: Also render the derived markdown companion.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.name: delegation-decision
subcommands.help: Record the delegation route chosen for the active execplan before mechanical lane work proceeds.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: plan
options.help: Plan path, slug, or id; defaults to the active execplan.

options.name: route
options.help: Delegation route chosen for this slice.

options.name: skipped_reason
options.help: Required explanation when route is keep-local.

options.name: expected_savings
options.help: Expected time or token savings.

options.name: actual_friction
options.help: Observed delegation friction.

options.name: proof_result
options.help: Proof or validation result for the delegation decision.

options.name: quality_concern
options.help: Any quality concern from delegation or skipping it.

options.name: decomposition_adjustment
options.help: Any follow-up adjustment needed in the decomposition.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

subcommands.name: handoff
subcommands.help: Emit the compact delegated-worker handoff derived from active planning state.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit broad diagnostic report detail.

commands.classification_note: planning lifecycle help and schema-owned mutation guidance

commands.name: memory
commands.help: Show memory workflow help or run Memory operations through the workspace front door.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used in example commands.

subcommands.name: route
subcommands.help: Suggest the smallest relevant durable note set for touched files or surfaces.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: files
options.help: Touched file paths to route from.

options.name: surfaces
options.help: Explicit routing surfaces.

subcommands.name: sync-memory
subcommands.help: Suggest memory updates for changed work.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: files
options.help: Changed file paths to inspect.

options.name: notes
options.help: Explicit memory notes to review.

subcommands.name: promotion-report
subcommands.help: Suggest memory notes that should be promoted or eliminated.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: notes
options.help: Explicit memory notes to inspect.

options.name: mode
options.help: Report all candidates or only remediation candidates.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit broad diagnostic report detail.

subcommands.name: capture-note
subcommands.help: Recommend whether durable learning should update or create a Memory note.

options.name: slug
options.help: Suggested note slug.

options.name: summary
options.help: Memory learning summary.

options.name: files
options.help: Changed files associated with the learning.

options.name: surfaces
options.help: Explicit routing surfaces.

options.name: existing_note
options.help: Existing note path to update.

options.name: force_new_reason
options.help: Reason a new note is required.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit broad diagnostic report detail.

commands.classification_note: memory lifecycle help and route guidance

commands.name: start
commands.help: Return the minimum safe startup context for beginning work in a target repository.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path for startup context (defaults to current workspace).

options.name: changed
options.help: Optional repo-relative changed paths used to include a proof recommendation.

options.name: task
options.help: Optional task description used to include task-specific skill recommendations in startup context.

options.name: select
options.help: Comma-separated startup fields to return, such as cli_invocation,durable_intent,skill_routing.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit broad diagnostic startup output. Prefer --select for ordinary detail.

commands.classification_note: ordinary first-contact startup context

commands.name: implement
commands.help: Return a cheap-implementer context for a bounded changed-path scope.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path for implementer context (defaults to current workspace).

options.name: changed
options.help: Repo-relative changed paths used to select inspect scope, boundary warnings, and proof commands.

options.name: task
options.help: Optional task text used to route broad external-work requests before implementation.

options.name: task_file
options.help: Optional repo-local file containing task text; use this instead of repeating long task prompts.

options.name: select
options.help: Return only comma-separated top-level or dotted JSON fields from the implementer context. Prefer this when one or a few fields are needed.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit full implementer context. Prefer the default output for ordinary bounded implementation.

commands.classification_note: bounded implementer context over changed paths

commands.name: defaults
commands.help: Show the machine-readable default-route contract for startup, lifecycle, skills, validation, and combined installs.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit the complete default-route contract. Prefer --section or default output for ordinary lookup.

options.name: section
options.help: Return only one top-level defaults section in the compact contract profile.

options.name: select
options.help: Return only comma-separated top-level or dotted JSON fields from the defaults payload. Prefer this over --verbose when one or a few fields are needed.

commands.classification_note: queryable default policy and routing contracts

commands.name: proof
commands.help: Show the canonical proof routes and current workspace proof summary.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to inspect installed modules and proof state.

options.name: route
options.help: Return one proof route by id instead of the full proof surface.

options.name: current
options.help: Return only the current proof summary.

options.name: changed
options.help: Return required proof commands for the provided repo-relative changed paths.

options.name: record_receipt
options.help: Record a compact proof receipt from an actually run validation command.

options.name: receipt_command
options.help: Validation command or evidence to store in the proof receipt.

options.name: receipt_result
options.help: Validation result to store in the proof receipt, such as passed or failed.

options.name: receipt_plan
options.help: Optional planning id that the proof receipt applies to.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show the receipt payload without writing it.

options.name: select
options.help: Return exact comma-separated field paths from the proof answer.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit all proof routing detail. Prefer the default changed-path proof answer for ordinary validation.

commands.classification_note: changed-path proof routing, authority checks, and explicit proof receipt recording

commands.name: setup
commands.help: Show the bounded post-bootstrap setup guidance for a mature repository.
commands.classification_note: post-bootstrap setup findings and guidance

commands.name: ownership
commands.help: Show the canonical ownership and authority mapping for the target repository.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to inspect the ownership ledger.

options.name: concern
options.help: Return one authority-surface answer by concern.

options.name: path
options.help: Return the ownership answer for one repo-relative path.

commands.classification_note: ownership and authority routing

commands.name: config
commands.help: Show the resolved repo-owned workspace config layered onto product defaults.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to resolve repo-owned config.

options.name: select
options.help: Return only comma-separated top-level or dotted JSON fields from the full command payload. Prefer this over --verbose when one or a few fields are needed.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit full resolved config detail. Prefer default output or targeted fields for ordinary posture checks.

commands.classification_note: resolved repo and local configuration posture

commands.name: system-intent
commands.help: Show or refresh the workspace-owned compiled system-intent declaration.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to inspect system intent.

options.name: sync
options.help: Refresh source discovery metadata and create the compiled system-intent declaration if it is missing.

commands.classification_note: compiled system-intent declaration and sync route

commands.name: note-delegation-outcome
commands.help: Append one local-only delegation outcome record for target-profile tuning.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to record the local outcome.

options.name: delegation_target
options.help: Local delegation target alias.

options.name: task_class
options.help: Bounded task class label for this delegated run.

options.name: outcome
options.help: High-level delegated execution outcome.

options.name: handoff_sufficiency
options.help: Whether the checked-in handoff was enough for the delegated worker.

options.name: review_burden
options.help: How much review/rework burden remained after delegation.

options.name: escalation_required
options.help: Record that the delegated run had to stop and escalate.

commands.classification_note: local-only delegation calibration record

commands.name: skills
commands.help: List registered workspace skills from installed package registries and repo-owned skill registries.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to inspect installed and repo-owned skills.

options.name: task
options.help: Optional task description used to recommend likely skills.

options.name: select
options.help: Comma-separated JSON fields to return, such as recommendations,warnings or top_recommendations,warnings.

commands.classification_note: registered package and repo skill routing

commands.name: report
commands.help: Show a compact combined workspace report for installed modules, mixed-agent posture, and next-action guidance.

options.name: startup
options.help: Return the high-signal orientation block for fresh agents.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit the full combined workspace report. Prefer default router output or --section for ordinary inspection.

options.name: section
options.help: Return one top-level full-report section in the compact contract profile.

commands.classification_note: combined compact workspace router and selected diagnostics

commands.name: reconcile
commands.help: Show stale planning state against provider-agnostic external work evidence.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path used to reconcile planning state.

options.name: apply_safe_prune
options.help: Apply only reconcile cleanup targets that are already marked safe_to_prune.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Preview --apply-safe-prune without writing files.

commands.classification_note: provider-agnostic external-work reconciliation

commands.name: external-intent
commands.help: Refresh optional provider-agnostic external intent evidence through adapter subcommands.

subcommands.name: refresh-github
subcommands.help: Refresh external intent evidence from GitHub issues through the optional gh CLI adapter.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path whose external intent evidence should be refreshed.

options.name: repo
options.help: GitHub repository in owner/name form. Defaults to the gh repository for the target.

options.name: state
options.help: GitHub issue state to import. Defaults to open; closed or all are explicit audit scopes.

options.name: limit
options.help: Maximum number of GitHub issues to import. Defaults to 1000.

options.name: storage
options.help: Where to write refreshed evidence. Defaults to ignored local cache; planning writes the legacy planning evidence path explicitly.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Preview refresh counts without writing external intent evidence.

subcommands.classification_note: optional GitHub adapter for provider-agnostic external evidence

commands.classification_note: optional external evidence adapter front door

commands.name: preflight
commands.help: Get compact takeover-safe context: startup defaults + resolved config + active planning state in one call.

options.name: target
options.help: Optional repository path for preflight context (defaults to current workspace).

options.name: active_only
options.help: Return only active planning state without startup defaults and config.

options.name: task
options.help: Optional task description used to include task-specific skill recommendations in preflight context.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit complete takeover/recovery context. Prefer default output for ordinary recovery routing.

commands.classification_note: takeover-safe compact startup plus active state

commands.name: install
commands.help: Bootstrap selected modules into a target repository.
commands.classification_note: module install lifecycle mutation

commands.name: init
commands.help: Bootstrap selected modules into a target repository.
commands.classification_note: conservative bootstrap/adopt lifecycle mutation

commands.name: prompt
commands.help: Print a ready-to-paste workspace lifecycle handoff prompt.

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.help: Print the workspace bootstrap handoff prompt.

options.name: agent_instructions_file
options.help: Canonical startup instructions filename to use for this repo (for example AGENTS.md or GEMINI.md).

options.name: adopt
options.help: Force conservative adopt behavior.

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.help: Print the workspace upgrade handoff prompt.

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.help: Print the workspace uninstall handoff prompt.

commands.classification_note: lifecycle handoff prompt renderer

commands.name: status
commands.help: Report installed modules and workspace health summary.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit all module lifecycle status detail. Prefer default output for ordinary health routing.

commands.classification_note: read-only lifecycle health status

commands.name: doctor
commands.help: Report drift, missing surfaces, and recommended remediation.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Emit all diagnostic detail. Prefer default output for ordinary remediation routing.

options.name: select
options.help: Return only comma-separated top-level or dotted JSON fields from the full command payload. Prefer this over --verbose when one or a few fields are needed.

commands.classification_note: read-only lifecycle drift diagnostics

commands.name: upgrade
commands.help: Refresh managed surfaces for selected installed modules.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

options.name: repair_managed_local_instructions
options.help: Refresh only the workspace-managed .agentic-workspace local agent instructions file.

commands.classification_note: module upgrade lifecycle mutation

commands.name: uninstall
commands.help: Remove managed surfaces conservatively for selected installed modules.

options.name: dry_run
options.help: Show planned changes without mutating files.

options.name: local_only
options.help: Remove the local-only workspace state from the normal repository layout.

commands.classification_note: conservative lifecycle removal mutation
